name: Morched Ammar
summary: Firmware and embedded AI engineer with a track record of shipping hardware that works — from interrupt-driven STM32 firmware and FreeRTOS multitasking on ESP32 to YOLOv8 computer vision and PPO reinforcement learning deployed on edge hardware. Built and validated systems in automotive diagnostics, industrial IoT, and real-time computer vision across three internships and four independent projects. Fluent in C/C++, Python, and the full embedded protocol stack: CAN, OBD-II, MQTT, I2C, SPI, BLE.

experience.title: Capgemini- Final year intern: mobile Dev
bullets: Built a Flutter/Dart OBD-II client supporting 6 real-time PIDs (RPM, speed, coolant temp, throttle position, fuel level, battery voltage) with live data streaming from real ECUs in a lab environment.
Developed a Flask-based ECU simulator capable of injecting, reading, and clearing active and pending DTC fault codes, validated against a physical ECU with 100% fault code retrieval accuracy.
Integrated a Wi-Fi/TCP-IP telemetry extraction pipeline tested on a real ECU, enabling real-time diagnostics with ELM327 hardware dongle.

experience.title: Sofrecom-Summer internship: embedded system
bullets: Developed a REST API leveraging the 51Degrees device detection engine to identify smartphone models and retrieve 14 environmental metrics including eco-rating, repairability, and climate efficiency scores.
Built a Raspberry Pi backend that processed 14-parameter sustainability profiles and transmitted structured data to an ESP8266 over Wi-Fi, delivering near-instant results on QR code scan

projects.name: TrafficOS — Deep RL Intersection Controller
projects.description: Engineered a custom OpenAI Gymnasium environment modeling a 4-way intersection with an 8-dimensional observation space (per-lane vehicle density + emergency vehicle priority flags). Trained a PPO agent (Stable Baselines3) over 500,000 timesteps, achieving a 30–35% reduction in average vehicle wait time vs. fixed-timer controllers.

projects.name: Padel Player Tracking — Computer Vision & IoT
projects.description: Engineered modular embedded firmware in C on STM32F407VG managing 3 sensors (LEM LTS 6-NP, DHT11, PIR) across I2C and SPI buses with a layered driver architecture enabling sensor hot-swap without core firmware changes. Implemented MQTT-over-Wi-Fi cloud pipeline for continuous telemetry upload, enabling remote monitoring and real-time actuation commands from a cloud dashboard.

projects.name: IoT Energy Monitoring System — STM32F407VG
projects.description: Engineered modular embedded firmware in C on STM32F407VG managing 3 sensors (LEM LTS 6-NP, DHT11, PIR) across I2C and SPI buses with a layered driver architecture enabling sensor hot-swap without core firmware changes. Implemented MQTT-over-Wi-Fi cloud pipeline for continuous telemetry upload, enabling remote monitoring and real-time actuation commands from a cloud dashboard.
